eventEntry.description: Fires when the user activates the button via pointer, Enter, or Space. Does not fire when the button is disabled or in its loading state.
Fires when the selected value changes as a result of user input. Does not fire for programmatic value updates.
Fires when the user closes the component via the close button, the Escape key, or an outside click. Provides the reason for dismissal so consumers can respond differently per source.
Deprecated. Fires when the expanded state changes.
eventEntry.deprecationNotice: Use onChange instead, which reports the same expanded state alongside the new value.

items.description: Fires when the user activates the button. Does not fire when disabled.
Fires when the button receives keyboard or programmatic focus.
Fires when the button loses focus.
